headline: 新片潮来袭！《痴迷》领跑今日热搜
headlineEn: New Movie Wave! 'Obsession' Tops Today's Trending
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，但《痴迷》《末日地堡》等片热度高涨。本周多部大片竞争激烈，未来《安昂传奇》《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》备受期待。
summaryEn: Entertainment news today: No new releases, but 'Obsession' and 'Silo' are trending. This week sees fierce competition among blockbusters, with 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' highly anticipated.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片仅3部，市场略显冷清。
industryHighlights.en: Only 3 new movies this week, market slightly quiet.

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》持续热映中。
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' continues to draw audiences.

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》跻身本周热搜前列。
industryHighlights.en: 'Toy Story 5' enters this week's top trending.

industryHighlights.text: 未来大片《奥德赛》引发影迷热议。
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming epic 'The Odyssey' sparks fan discussions.
